seller_info_text: Dispatched from and sold by World of Books Ltd.
description: From the Publisher Boost Your Teen's Confidence The teenage years can be tough. With so many challenges and uncertainties, your teen might feel lost at times. This book is here to guide them, helping them discover their unique greatness and embrace their authentic self. Encourage Personal Growth Packed with 44 proven exercises from real coaching practices, this motivational self-help book equips your teen with essential life skills. From building self-esteem and body positivity to strengthening relationships and excelling academically, it goes beyond the surface to teach invaluable social skills often left out of school curricula. Healthy Media Habits “How do I get my teen off the screen?” If this question sounds familiar, you’re not alone. This book empowers your child to rethink their media usage, offering practical challenges and exercises to spend more time in the real world while using technology for meaningful purposes. Build Strong Friendships Navigating friendships can be tricky for teens. This book helps them distinguish healthy connections from toxic ones, understand key principles for maintaining strong friendships, and even tackle tough issues like bullying and dating with confidence. Strengthen Family Connections Teen years can strain family dynamics, but this book offers tools to transform conflict into growth. With tips on positive communication, effective negotiation, and resolving tensions, your teen will learn how to build stronger, more respectful relationships at home. Succeed in School and Beyond From excelling academically to planning a bright future, this book inspires teens to learn not just for school, but for life. Combining actionable study tips with real stories of teens overcoming obstacles, it helps your child create a positive vision for their future and take steps to achieve it. From the Author How to Make Your Teen's Life Amazing - And Beyond I can still vividly recall all the dramas and challenges of my own youth. I was a bundle of insecurities, never feeling good enough, never pretty enough, and wishing I could be invisible to avoid all the embarrassments. Years later, I found myself standing before hundreds of people as a speaker and working as a coach with leaders managing companies with thousands of employees, helping to reorganize those businesses: confident and unafraid. What lies in between are years of training as NLP master, extensive self-exploration, and deep self-discovery. I often reflect on how much happier my youth could have been if I had known then what I know and can do now. It is this motivation that inspired me to write this book: to provide teenagers and young adults with the insights and tools that helped me successfully navigate my path as an adult. I am confident that this book will become your special guide to become the best version of yourself and step boldly into the future. Enjoy!
